message:
feat(render-term): expand ASCII renderer and integrate terminal rendering modules

Significant expansion of the terminal rendering subsystem:
- ascii.rs: refine ASCII art renderer with improved box-drawing fallbacks
- config.rs: add terminal rendering configuration options
- lib.rs: add 248 lines of terminal rendering orchestration and public API
- diff.rs: improve diff rendering for terminal output
- minimap.rs: enhance minimap visualization
- renderer.rs: wire ASCII renderer into main rendering pipeline

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
